productName: Pineapple Express ( H ) - Flipside Distillate Disposable 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Pineapple Express oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Simple, smooth, portable, with notes of pineapple, tropical, and citrus, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
